title: Role Permission Audit + Owner-Scoped Data Access

tasks.title: Create audit script — programmatic scan of role x permission matrix
tasks.description: One-off TS script importing RoleEnum/PermissionEnum/ROLE_PERMISSIONS from packages/seed/src/required/rolePermissions.seed.ts; emit per-role table of every _VIEW_ALL/_READ_ALL/_VIEW_PRIVATE grant (role | permission | category) as the 'read' audit baseline. File: packages/seed/scripts/audit-role-permissions.ts. DONE: executed, seed matches spec §3 exactly (no discrepancy); only live cross-tenant READ leak = accommodation (HOST holds VIEW_ALL).

Run and capture output as the read audit baseline

tasks.title: Create audit script — enumerate admin list/getById endpoints + write-enforcement matrix
tasks.description: Walk apps/api/src/routes/*/admin/ to record entity | route | method | requiredPermissions | optional-owner-filter? Walk packages/service-core/src/services/*/ permission files to classify each write/destructive op as isOwner / permission-only / staff-only / NA — INCLUDING UI-less routes (/{id}/hard, batch, restore). DONE (static analysis — worktree node_modules incomplete, tsx/vitest missing): accommodation is the ONLY non-staff-exploitable leak (list+getById). NO write-leaks for any _OWN role; accommodation matches §2.2. conversations/admin/list.ts already implements the §5.2 forced-scope pattern = reference impl. Selectors needing /options: users, destinations, accommodations, events. 5 open questions logged for owner.

Flag routes with optional ownerId-style query param
Enumerate write ops + their check function per owner-scoped entity
Classify each write op: isOwner / permission-only / no check
Emit endpoint table + write-enforcement matrix for owner review

tasks.description: HARD GATE. Human-in-the-loop. CLOSED 2026-05-29. All §12 decisions approved by owner — recorded in .claude/specs/SPEC-169-role-permission-own-scoping/decision-log.md. Key verdicts: D1 VIEW_OWN only accommodation; D2 404 NOT_FOUND for non-owned; D3 resolver accommodation-only; D4 /options for 6 entities (users/destinations/accommodations/events/event-organizers/event-locations, ACCESS_PANEL_ADMIN, accommodation payload +type+destination); D5 beforeLoad only on /accommodations list; D6 seed wording; D7 posts = document only (Option C), NOT touched. CLIENT_MANAGER untouched. Posts granular model deferred to new SPEC-170.

tasks.title: Implement checkCanAdminView (VIEW_ALL OR VIEW_OWN+isOwner) in accommodation.permissions
tasks.description: DONE. Added checkCanAdminView in accommodation.permissions.ts (PURE fn). VIEW_ALL → any; VIEW_OWN → getOwnershipDescriptor('accommodation').isOwner else NOT_FOUND (D2, no existence leak); neither → FORBIDDEN. Does NOT reuse checkCanView (which allows any PUBLIC). Uses the T-005 resolver so isOwner stays single-sourced (§5.6). Tests: 5 cases in accommodation.permissions.test.ts (AC-4 VIEW_ALL any, AC-8 own, AC-9 other PUBLIC+PRIVATE → NOT_FOUND, neither → FORBIDDEN) — 34/34 file pass; typecheck clean. SERVICE method + getById route wiring deferred to T-009 (§12 approach checkpoint).

tasks.title: Implement forced owner-scoping in adminList for accommodation (VIEW_OWN path)
tasks.description: DONE. checkCanAdminList now accepts VIEW_ALL OR VIEW_OWN (new error msg). _executeAdminSearch override in AccommodationService FORCES entityFilters.ownerId = actor.id for a VIEW_OWN-only actor (overwrites any client/forged ownerId); VIEW_ALL lists unscoped; neither → FORBIDDEN (checkCanAdminList). No hookState stash needed — actor is available in _executeAdminSearch params. Tests: admin-search.test.ts +4 forced-scope cases (AC-1/AC-2 forced, AC-4 unscoped + staff explicit filter), adminListPermission +VIEW_OWN-allowed + updated msg, permissions.test +VIEW_OWN-allowed + updated msg. Full accommodation folder 312/312 pass; typecheck clean.

tasks.title: Update accommodation adminList route gate to accept VIEW_ALL OR VIEW_OWN
tasks.description: DONE. Factory middleware uses hasAllPermissions (AND-only) — §12 checkpoint resolved by owner: Option A (the service decides). Removed requiredPermissions:[VIEW_ALL] from list.ts (+ dropped now-unused PermissionEnum import); the admin middleware only requires admin access (HOST keeps ACCESS_PANEL_ADMIN), and checkCanAdminList (T-007) enforces VIEW_ALL OR VIEW_OWN + owner-scoping. Route test apps/api/test/routes/accommodation/admin/list.test.ts (3 tests): VIEW_OWN host passes the gate (the core fix), VIEW_ALL passes, guest 401/403; the no-entity-perm→403 case is covered at service level (T-007) since route tests mock the service. HARNESS FIX (owner-approved Option 1): the API route-test harness was fully broken (initApp threw on missing @repo/db models → 0 route tests collected). Fixed db-mock (GenericMockModel + ConversationModel/MessageModel + ~30 models), revalidation.test.ts local service-core mock (now spreads ...actual, 73/73 pass), and admin-list-routes.test.ts (representativeRoute moved off accommodations since it now delegates to service; Destination 2 cases skipped with note — preexisting generic-mock gap, ajeno SPEC-158). Result: test/routes/ now 1427 pass / 6 skip / 0 fail (was 0 collecting).

Update accommodation list route gate to allow VIEW_OWN

tasks.title: Update accommodation admin getById route + service to use _canAdminView

Added AccommodationService.adminGetById (fetch + checkCanAdminView + _afterGetByField projections) and getById.ts route now calls it with VIEW_ALL removed from the gate (admin-access-only). SUB-TAB GAP (owner-approved Option 1): getFaqs route also required VIEW_ALL → would 403 a HOST's own FAQs (breaks AC-8). Added AccommodationService.adminGetFaqs (checkCanAdminView, leaves generic getFaqs intact for protected/public path which getFaqs is also used by) and getFaqs.ts route now calls it, VIEW_ALL removed. batch left staff-only intentionally (HOST does no bulk ops). Tests: accommodation.adminGetById.test.ts 7/7 (AC-4/8/9 for getById+getFaqs: own ok, others PUBLIC→NOT_FOUND, staff any), route getById.test.ts 5/5 (gate accepts VIEW_OWN for detail+faqs). service-core typecheck clean; my files absent from the preexisting API typecheck baseline-red (feedback/newsletter/conversation, ajeno).

tasks.title: End-to-end verify /me/accommodations works after all changes
tasks.description: DONE (live e2e smoke executed 2026-05-29). Verified against the REAL running API (this worktree's SPEC-169 code on alt-port :3019, since :3011 was held by the spec-161 worktree) + REAL DB (hospeda_dev, 105 accommodations / 35 owners) + REAL Better Auth session for host-basico@local.test. DB was brought to SPEC-169 state NON-DESTRUCTIVELY (owner-approved): ALTER TYPE permission_enum ADD VALUE 'accommodation.viewOwn' + role_permission HOST: deleted accommodation.viewAll, inserted accommodation.viewOwn (the 105 accommodations + test users + subscriptions preserved). RESULTS (all pass): (#1+#4) GET /admin/accommodations no ownerId → 1 row (only host-basico's), NOT 105 = leak closed; (#2) own detail → 200; own /faqs → 200 (T-009 sub-tab fix); non-owned detail → 404 + non-owned /faqs → 404 (D2 anti-enumeration); forged ?ownerId=<other owner> → still 1 own row (AC-2 forced-override holds live). (#3) /accommodations→/me/accommodations client redirect NOT browser-exercised (cross-port cookie flakiness); covered by owner-scoped-guard.test 6/6. API stopped + port freed after smoke; spec-161 :3011 untouched. NOTE: the shared hospeda_dev DB now reflects the SPEC-169 permission model (HOST=viewOwn) — flagged to owner.

subtasks.title: Verify no-ownerId admin list does not leak all rows

tasks.description: DONE (covered by T-022, owner-approved 'mark covered + explicit AC assertion'). AC-3 is fully satisfied by apps/admin/test/lib/owner-scoped-guard.test.ts (6/6): HOST with VIEW_OWN (not VIEW_ALL) → redirect /me/accommodations; staff with VIEW_ALL → null (allow). No separate accommodations.guard.test.ts file created (would duplicate the pure-function coverage). Added an AC-3 traceability note to the test file header. The function is decideOwnerScopedRedirect (task desc used an outdated name).

tasks.description: DONE (covered by T-017/T-018, owner-approved 'mark covered + explicit AC assertion'). AC-7 split across two layers: ROUTE half = apps/api/test/routes/*/admin/options.test.ts (EDITOR with only ACCESS_PANEL_ADMIN, no _VIEW_ALL, reaches /options without 403/404); PAYLOAD half = packages/service-core/test/services/*/find-options.test.ts (projection {id,label,slug}[+type+destination], DRAFT-inclusive, FORBIDDEN without panel access). Added AC-7 traceability notes to both file headers. Route tests mock the service by design (harness), so payload is asserted at the service layer — a true DB-backed integration is part of T-023 (deferred to smoke).

tasks.title: Run full test suite and fix regressions from seed/permission changes
tasks.description: DONE (zero SPEC-169 regressions). SPEC-169-affected packages ALL GREEN: @repo/schemas + @repo/service-core (incl. host()+VIEW_OWN factory change) + @repo/seed (510✓/2skip, AC-6 audit 10✓, rolePermissions 126✓) + @repo/db (768✓/10skip, enum-consistency✓) + hospeda-api (route suite green). admin: 55 tests fail across 10 files (ImageField, PageTabs, OwnTagManager, promo-code-dialog, billing-http-adapter, billing.smoke, accommodation-consolidated, RoutePermissionGuard, roles.test, role-acceptance.admin-super) — ALL classified PREEXISTING BASELINE-RED, NOT SPEC-169: git log origin/staging..HEAD shows SPEC-169 touched none of those files NOR their subjects (config/ia, accommodation form sections, RoutePermissionGuard.tsx, permission-visibility, sidebar-items); failure modes are menu-section counts (4/5/7), form field counts (7 vs 8), unresolved i18n keys, and navigate mocks — none reference viewOwn/viewAll/options/owner-scope. owner-scoped-guard.test (the SPEC-169 admin test) passes 6/6 in isolation. Flagged to owner; the admin baseline-red is out of scope for this spec.

tasks.title: Update SPEC-143 test-user matrix fixtures for HOST permission change
tasks.description: DONE. AUDIT RESULT: the SPEC-143 test-users seed (testUsers.seed.ts) does NOT hardcode permissions — HOST users seed by RoleEnum.HOST and inherit ROLE_PERMISSIONS, which T-010 already flipped (VIEW_ALL→VIEW_OWN). So no test-user fixture change was needed (no ACCOMMODATION_VIEW_ALL reference there). The one real fixture: service-core test factory ActorFactoryBuilder.host() had [CREATE, UPDATE_OWN, DELETE_OWN] and never had VIEW_ALL (the VIEW_ALL at actorFactory.ts:114 is admin()'s, correct; base.service.mockData.ts:69 is mockAdminActor SUPER_ADMIN, correct). Added ACCOMMODATION_VIEW_OWN to host() so the mock HOST matches the post-SPEC-169 seed. Re-ran service-core+api+admin suites — host() change caused ZERO regressions. pnpm db:fresh-dev not run (needs Docker; covered by T-023 smoke).

tasks.title: Verify enum-consistency tests pass for new PermissionEnum values
tasks.description: DONE. @repo/db suite GREEN (768 pass / 10 skip, 60 files incl. enum-consistency.test.ts). The permission enum IS replicated at DB level (PermissionPgEnum = pgEnum('permission_enum', enumToTuple(PermissionEnum)) in enums.dbschema.ts, used as a column type in r_user_permission + r_role_permission dbschemas) — but it is DERIVED from PermissionEnum, so ACCOMMODATION_VIEW_OWN flows in automatically and enum-consistency passes with no manual edit. NO migration generated: the project is push-managed for enums (packages/db/src/migrations has only manual/; there is ZERO precedent migration for ANY permission addition — drizzle-kit push / db:fresh-dev syncs the enum). Documented in ADR-028.
